title: MC and More
description: A resource pack that makes ore outlined, carved pumpkins see-through and more!
body:
MC and More is a Quality of Life resource pack, making Minecraft easier and better for everyone.




Available for versions 1.12 - 1.21 (PVP version is for 1.8.x)



Features:



- Rainbow breaking particles

- Dark GUI

- A shield that has a TM on it
- See-through Carved Pumpkins

- Something else... (beat the ender dragon)

- Changes the texture of Netherite tools
- A painting that has a 12 on it
- A bed that has an XII on it (Non-PVP)


- Makes lava buckets appear hot and powder snow buckets appear cold


- Splash text now says "MC and More", "TheMarksmanXII", and more


- Armor bar is now invisible (Non-PVP)


- Resource packs and Servers without icons now show a Grass Block as the icon


- Makes the sword texture slightly smaller (PVP)


- Hides "Java Edition" text from the main menu title
- Glass is clearer (except black stained glass, just use tinted at that point)
- Ores have outlines
- Credits now have "TheMarksmanXII" as the creator and head developer of MC and More, "MegaRaptor" as the secondary developer, and Aqua_Lx as the beta tester


- Bows and Crossbows change color as they charge


- Hides potion particles (Non-PVP)




Notes:



- **Huge shoutout to MegaRaptor for being the secondary developer of the pack! You're awesome, more than you realize!!!**


- **Another huge shoutout to Aqua_Lx for being the beta tester of the pack! You really helped me with the 1.0a update, more than you realized!!**


- This pack has many textures from other resource packs, a full list can be found here.


- The "XII" and "12" and "TheMarksmanXII" visuals are only for promotion, you can customize some of these yourself
